headline: Donate Blood, Save Lives
subtext: Find available blood donors near you and request blood during emergencies.
emergencyLoadError: Could not load emergency requests. Please check that the backend is running.
findDesc: Search by blood group and city to locate available donors.
registerDesc: Donors can create a profile and update availability anytime.
respondDesc: Patients and hospitals can publish urgent requests quickly.
bloodBanksEmpty: Blood banks will appear here after data is added.
learnBeforeDonateDesc: Understand eligibility, benefits, and what to expect during a donation.
aboutLead: Kerala Blood Connect helps communities respond faster when someone needs blood.
missionDesc: Our mission is to make blood donation more discoverable, trusted, and timely across Kerala by connecting donors, patients, hospitals, and blood banks in one place.
whyDonationMattersDesc: Blood cannot be manufactured. Every donor profile can become the difference between delay and care during surgeries, accidents, childbirth complications, and cancer treatments.
loginTitle: Welcome back to Kerala Blood Connect
registerTitle: Create your Kerala Blood Connect profile
messageSent: Message sent. Our team will review it soon.
name: Name
emergencyContactDesc: For immediate medical emergencies, call 108 or contact the nearest hospital blood bank.
benefitsDonationDesc: Blood donation supports emergency care, surgeries, cancer treatment, trauma response, and maternal health.
donationEligibilityDesc: Eligibility depends on age, health, recent illness, medications, travel, and prior donation date.
faqWhoA: Healthy adults between 18 and 65 years who meet weight, hemoglobin, and medical eligibility requirements can usually donate.
faqOftenA: Donation intervals depend on local medical guidance. Many whole blood donors wait around three months between donations.
faqSafeA: Yes, when performed by trained professionals using sterile single-use equipment.
faqBeforeQ: What should I do before donating?
faqBeforeA: Eat well, drink water, sleep properly, and carry identification.
loginHeroDesc: Manage your donor profile, respond faster, and help people find safe blood support when every minute matters.
loginFormDesc: Use your donor or admin account to access your dashboard.
registerHeroTitle: Your profile can save time in an emergency
registerHeroDesc: Register once, keep your availability updated, and let people near you reach out through secure contact buttons.
